description: Default Proxmox VM parameters for an Anglerfish AI honeypot. deploy.sh reads this file when constructing the qm-create command. Operators may copy + edit; deploy.sh accepts --template <path> to override.

notes: vmbr-bait should be attached to a physical NIC exposed to attacker traffic; never to the Proxmox management NIC.
vmbr-service should be attached to the operator network so the dashboard and SSH ops are reachable.
Neither bridge should be the same as vmbr0 unless the operator has explicitly designed for it.
